spi_agent_pkg
package spi_agent_pkg

SPI agent package that contains supporting classes for burst read and write, in addition to an adapter for RAL that is specific to this agent.

Since this is an extension of the oscillator_agent, requires that oscillator_agent_pkg be compiled.

Includes the following classes:

  • spi_packet

  • spi_packet_reg_extension

  • spi_driver

  • spi_monitor

  • spi_agent_cfg

  • spi_agent

  • spi_packet_splitter

  • reg2spi_adapter
